summary: User sync combines network and file side effects in one unmockable method.

findings.evidence: syncUsers directly instantiates HttpURLConnection and File writes, preventing isolated unit tests.
findings.minimal_fix: Extract HttpClient and FileWriter interfaces and inject implementations.
findings.verification: Add unit tests using fake clients and verify body persistence behavior.

findings.evidence: Current approach pushes tests toward slow integration-only coverage.
findings.minimal_fix: Split fast unit tests for parsing/persistence and limited integration tests for real I/O.
findings.verification: Measure test runtime before/after and ensure unit suite remains deterministic.

findings.evidence: One method manages transport, serialization boundary, and persistence concern simultaneously.
findings.minimal_fix: Separate transport fetch, domain mapping, and persistence writing responsibilities.
findings.verification: Run unit tests per extracted component and one end-to-end sync smoke test.
